mapper.select:
SELECT r.id as reportId, r.reporter_id as reporterId, u1.name as reporterName, r.target_id as targetId, r.post_id as postNum, r.category, r.title, r.content, r.file, r.result, r.status, r.reg_date as regDate, r.process_date as processDate FROM REPORT r LEFT JOIN USER u1 on(r.reporter_id=u1.id) WHERE 1=1 AND status = 'WAIT' AND status IN ('REJECT', 'HIDE')
AND (r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC

SELECT r.id as reportId, r.reporter_id as reporterId, u1.name as reporterName, r.target_id as targetId, u2.name as targetName, r.post_id as postNum, r.category, r.title, r.content, r.file, r.result, r.status, r.reg_date as regDate, r.process_date as processDate FROM REPORT r LEFT JOIN USER u1 on(r.reporter_id=u1.id) LEFT JOIN USER u2 on(r.target_id=u2.id) WHERE r.id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, process_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{reportId}
